tools.name: generate_cbom.py
tools.description: Cosmian KMS CBOM generator — combines cargo metadata with source scanning

component.name: cosmian-kms
component.description: Cosmian Key Management System — FIPS 140-3 compliant KMS server

components.name: openssl (Rust bindings to OpenSSL FIPS provider)
AES-128-GCM
components.description: DEM in ECIES P-256; KMIP Encrypt/Decrypt; CoverCrypt data encapsulation

components.name: AES-192-GCM
components.description: KMIP Encrypt/Decrypt (192-bit symmetric keys)

components.name: AES-256-GCM
components.description: DEM in ECIES P-384/P-521; KMIP Encrypt/Decrypt; CoverCrypt data encapsulation

components.name: AES-128-CBC
components.description: KMIP Encrypt/Decrypt

components.name: AES-192-CBC
components.description: KMIP Encrypt/Decrypt

components.name: AES-256-CBC
components.description: KMIP Encrypt/Decrypt

components.name: AES-128-ECB
components.description: KMIP Encrypt/Decrypt (not recommended for new data-at-rest encryption)

components.name: AES-192-ECB
components.description: KMIP Encrypt/Decrypt

components.name: AES-256-ECB
components.description: KMIP Encrypt/Decrypt

components.name: AES-128-XTS
components.description: KMIP Encrypt/Decrypt (storage / disk encryption)

components.name: AES-256-XTS
components.description: KMIP Encrypt/Decrypt (storage / disk encryption)

components.name: AES-128-GCM-SIV
components.description: KMIP Encrypt/Decrypt; nonce-misuse-resistant AEAD (non-FIPS only)

components.name: AES-256-GCM-SIV
components.description: KMIP Encrypt/Decrypt; nonce-misuse-resistant AEAD (non-FIPS only)

components.name: ChaCha20-Poly1305
components.description: KMIP Encrypt/Decrypt (non-FIPS only)

components.name: AES-KW
components.description: KMIP Import/Export key wrapping without padding (RFC 3394 / NIST SP 800-38F)

components.name: AES-KWP
components.description: KMIP Import/Export key wrapping with padding (RFC 5649); used inside CKM_RSA_AES_KEY_WRAP

components.name: RSA-OAEP
components.description: KMIP key wrapping (CKM_RSA_PKCS_OAEP); RSA key sizes 2048 / 3072 / 4096 bits

components.name: CKM_RSA_AES_KEY_WRAP
components.description: PKCS#11-compatible hybrid key wrapping: RSA-OAEP wraps a per-session AES key; AES-KWP wraps the target key

components.name: RSA-PKCS1-v1.5
components.description: KMIP key wrapping (CKM_RSA_PKCS) — deprecated; removed from FIPS 140-3 approved list

components.name: ECIES-P256
components.description: Hybrid encrypt/wrap with P-256: ECDH + SHAKE-128 (KDF+IV) + AES-128-GCM; non-FIPS only

components.name: ECIES-P384
components.description: Hybrid encrypt/wrap with P-384: ECDH + SHAKE-256 (KDF+IV) + AES-256-GCM; non-FIPS only

components.name: ECIES-P521
components.description: Hybrid encrypt/wrap with P-521: ECDH + SHAKE-256 (KDF+IV) + AES-256-GCM; non-FIPS only

components.name: ECIES-X25519-XSalsa20-Poly1305
components.description: Salsa Sealed Box: libsodium-compatible (X25519 ECDH + XSalsa20-Poly1305); non-FIPS only

components.name: P256-KEM
components.description: Pre-quantum KEM over P-256: MonadicKEM<32, P256, SHA-256>; shared secret 32 bytes; used in CoverCrypt

components.name: R25519-KEM
components.description: Pre-quantum KEM over Ristretto255/X25519: GenericKEM<32, R25519, SHA-256>; non-FIPS

components.name: ML-KEM-512
components.description: Post-quantum KEM (NIST FIPS 203 Level 1); used in CoverCrypt hybrid KEM

components.name: ML-KEM-768
components.description: Post-quantum KEM (NIST FIPS 203 Level 3); used in CoverCrypt hybrid KEM

components.name: P256+ML-KEM-512 Hybrid KEM
components.description: Hybrid KEM: P256-KEM ⊕ ML-KEM-512 via KemCombiner<SHA-256>; CoverCrypt ABE policy encryption

components.name: P256+ML-KEM-768 Hybrid KEM
components.description: Hybrid KEM: P256-KEM ⊕ ML-KEM-768 via KemCombiner<SHA-256>; CoverCrypt ABE policy encryption

components.name: R25519+ML-KEM-512 Hybrid KEM
components.description: Hybrid KEM: R25519-KEM ⊕ ML-KEM-512 via KemCombiner<SHA-256>; non-FIPS

components.name: R25519+ML-KEM-768 Hybrid KEM
components.description: Hybrid KEM: R25519-KEM ⊕ ML-KEM-768 via KemCombiner<SHA-256>; non-FIPS

components.name: KEM Combiner (SHA-256)
components.description: Combines two KEM outputs: SHA-256(ek ‖ ss₁ ‖ ss₂ ‖ enc₁ ‖ enc₂); CCA-secure if either KEM is secure

components.name: RSASSA-PSS-2048
components.description: KMIP Sign/Verify — RSA-2048 with PSS padding (FIPS 186-5)

components.name: RSASSA-PSS-3072
components.description: KMIP Sign/Verify — RSA-3072 with PSS padding (FIPS 186-5)

components.name: RSASSA-PSS-4096
components.description: KMIP Sign/Verify — RSA-4096 with PSS padding (FIPS 186-5)

components.name: ECDSA-P256
components.description: KMIP Sign/Verify — NIST P-256 (FIPS 186-5 / SP 800-186)

components.name: ECDSA-P384
components.description: KMIP Sign/Verify — NIST P-384 (FIPS 186-5 / SP 800-186)

components.name: ECDSA-P521
components.description: KMIP Sign/Verify — NIST P-521 (FIPS 186-5 / SP 800-186)

components.name: ECDSA-secp256k1
components.description: KMIP Sign/Verify — secp256k1 with RFC 6979 deterministic signing; non-FIPS only

components.name: EdDSA-Ed25519
components.description: KMIP Sign/Verify — Ed25519 (FIPS 186-5)

components.name: EdDSA-Ed448
components.description: KMIP Sign/Verify — Ed448 (FIPS 186-5)

components.name: ECDH-P256
components.description: ECDH key agreement step inside ECIES P-256

components.name: ECDH-P384
components.description: ECDH key agreement step inside ECIES P-384

components.name: ECDH-P521
components.description: ECDH key agreement step inside ECIES P-521

components.name: X25519
components.description: ECDH key agreement inside ECIES Salsa Sealed Box; X25519 KMIP key type

components.name: PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA-256
components.description: KMIP DeriveKey (PBKDF2 method, default hash, default 600 000 iterations)

components.name: PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA-384
components.description: KMIP DeriveKey (PBKDF2 method)

components.name: PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA-512
components.description: KMIP DeriveKey (PBKDF2 method); password-based key derivation in FIPS mode (210 000 iterations, random 128-bit salt)

components.name: HKDF-SHA-256
components.description: KMIP DeriveKey (HKDF method, default hash)

components.name: HKDF-SHA-384
components.description: KMIP DeriveKey (HKDF method)

components.name: HKDF-SHA-512
components.description: KMIP DeriveKey (HKDF method)

components.name: Argon2id
components.description: Password-based key derivation in non-FIPS mode (random 128-bit salt; computationally hard)

components.name: SHA-1
components.description: Accepted only as optional hash argument for PBKDF2 and HKDF; not used by default

components.name: SHA-224
components.description: Supported hash for RSASSA-PSS, PBKDF2, HKDF, RSA-OAEP

components.name: SHA-256
components.description: Default hash in RSASSA-PSS, PBKDF2, HKDF, RSA-OAEP; KEM combiner KDF

components.name: SHA-384
components.description: Supported hash for RSASSA-PSS, PBKDF2, HKDF, RSA-OAEP

components.name: SHA-512
components.description: Supported hash for RSASSA-PSS, PBKDF2, HKDF, RSA-OAEP; FIPS-mode password derivation

components.name: SHA3-224
components.description: Supported hash for RSA-OAEP and general KMIP hash operations

components.name: SHA3-256
components.description: Supported hash for RSA-OAEP and general KMIP hash operations

components.name: SHA3-384
components.description: Supported hash for RSA-OAEP and general KMIP hash operations

components.name: SHA3-512
components.description: Supported hash for RSA-OAEP and general KMIP hash operations

components.name: SHAKE-128
components.description: KDF + IV derivation in ECIES P-256 (non-FIPS context; NIST FIPS 202)

components.name: SHAKE-256
components.description: KDF + IV derivation in ECIES P-384 / P-521 (non-FIPS context; NIST FIPS 202)
